breakdown: PR adds a normalization function to handle messy rewards_box payloads from LLMs (e.g., 'xp' vs 'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces' vs 'gold'). The function properly falls back to alternative keys and cleans up raw keys. Test coverage is excellent with a real E2E test. Minor gaps: missing type hints on the new function and no docstring for the public-ish helper.
key_changes: Added normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() function with fallback logic for xp/xp_gained and gold/gold_pieces keys
Modified _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair to apply normalization before passthrough
Added test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py E2E test that verifies normalization with real LLM
Uses copy.deepcopy to avoid mutating original rewards_box
Removes raw keys (xp, gold_pieces) after normalization to ensure clean output
